name: Daemon Commit Messages from Task Metadata

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Daemon Commit Messages from Task Metadata is complete and correct

success_criteria: Daemon commits use task title as subject line, with task ID, class, deliverables, and latest breadcrumb in the body
GitConfig has a commit_prefix field defaulting to wolfcastle
Failure commits include (attempt N) in subject and failure type in body
All existing tests pass and new tests cover the enriched message format

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: add-commit-prefix-config (leaf), enrich-commit-messages-with-task-metadata (leaf). Ordering: config field first because the message builder reads CommitPrefix from GitConfig. Found relevant specs: deterministic-git spec defines current message format, separate-git-index ADR governs commit mechanics. Existing unused CommitMessageFormat field noted but left untouched per scope.
